Regulatory.Workflow.LegacyEvidenceHelp: File registered through the V1 flow.
Regulatory.Workflow.RefreshActions: The action is no longer available; reload the dossier.
Regulatory.Workflow.SpecialistPermission: Specialist permission to update the dossier is required.
Regulatory.Workflow.Unavailable: Workflow V2 is unavailable. V1 remains readable, but V2 actions are blocked.
Regulatory.Workflow.ScopeOnlyHelp: Only listed requirements accept new versions until the correction is submitted.
Regulatory.Workflow.NoActions: No actions are available for your role in this state.
Regulatory.Workflow.OutsideScope: Locked: this requirement is outside the active correction scope.
Regulatory.Workflow.MetadataHelp: Changes are audited against the current dossier revision.
Regulatory.Workflow.AssigneesLoadFailed: Could not load the owner list.
Regulatory.Workflow.HashHelp: The server verifies and uses the SHA-256 calculated during secure storage.
Regulatory.Workflow.SubmitCorrectionHelp: Every scoped requirement must have an active version linked to this correction.
Regulatory.Workflow.ReopenHelp: Reopening follows governance and requires two independent approvals.
Regulatory.Workflow.OverrideHelp: This request does not bypass controls: it requires approvals and audited consumption.
Regulatory.Workflow.ArchiveHelp: Only a closed dossier can be archived. The action is audited.
Regulatory.Workflow.CancelHelp: Cancellation is logical: requirements, documents, history, and audit are preserved.
